title: Cosmiza multifida

taxonomy: Cosmiza multifida is a species of leafhopper in the family Cicadellidae. It is classified as a member of the subfamily Deltocephalinae. Further classification places it within the tribe Erythroneurini. Within the tribe, Cosmiza multifida is assigned to the genus Cosmiza. This classification is based on various biological and morphological characteristics of the species.
uses: Cosmiza multifida, also known as the leaf-tipped grasshopper or grasshopper leaf, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of the world.
